989 BILVL_PSTV_ARWY_PRSR_DSCHRG_CD BILVL_PSTV_ARWY_PRSR_DSCHRG_CD O0110G2C Therapies: BiPAP (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a BiPAP ventilator in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
